creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
When starting the service:

[17:36 r730-01 dvl ~] % sudo service bsdstats start 
Starting bsdstats.
BSDstats failed: Server didn't return the status for token enabling
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/bsdstats: WARNING: failed to start bsdstats
[17:36 r730-01 dvl ~] % 

[17:36 r730-01 dvl ~] % pkg info -x bsdstats
bsdstats-7.0_3
[17:42 r730-01 dvl ~] % freebsd-version 
14.2-RELEASE
